text.title: The Mom Test Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: frame-hypothesis
step.action: Write a 1-sentence hypothesis. Identify pain + persona. Identify what 'commitment' would look like (time, reputation, money).
step.decision-gate: If hypothesis is about a feature, restate as a pain hypothesis.

step.name: generate-script
step.action: Run `prompt-question-gen.txt` via sonnet. Output must satisfy past-tense rule + include current-spend question.

step.name: run-interview
step.action: Conduct the call. Record (with consent). Apply 80/20 listening discipline.
step.decision-gate: If interviewer word-share exceeds 20% mid-call, switch to silence + paraphrase.

step.name: classify-signals
step.action: Run `signal-classifier.py` to count compliments, facts, commitments + interviewer word-share.

step.name: go-no-go
step.action: Aggregate across N=5+ interviews. Decision: ≥ 3 commitments + ≤ 20% talk → green; otherwise reframe hypothesis.
step.decision-gate: If green, transition to scoped pilot; if not, return to step 1.
